notes: Converted the messages subset of the Gmail API v1 Discovery document. The gmail adaptor uses the googleapis SDK: getContentsFromMessages maps to users.messages.list + users.messages.get, and sendMessage maps to users.messages.send. Only the messages resource (list/get/send) and its Message/MessagePart schemas are modeled; labels, threads, drafts, history, and attachments endpoints are omitted as the adaptor does not call them.
